sections.content: Human beings have an innate fascination with storytelling. Compelling Storytelling has emerged as an innovative technique in corporate, to transfer information by fetching much required attention. Storytelling can be used at all the levels in the organization whether its brand building, sharing the vision, presenting data or motivating the employees. Individuals positioning themselves in the story telling framework, can advance in the organization by impactful communication skills. We at Skillsbucket, conduct ‘Business storytelling’ as a one day experiential workshop. We enable people to construct their self narratives and weave interesting business stories around it. We also help them structure and execute the stories seamlessly for great results.

content: Understand the art and science of storytelling and why it captures great attention
Learn the different structures of story telling format
